'''janana''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:headground|headground]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| j-n-n
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:headground|headground]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| janana
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:jænænæth|jænænæth]] || [[word:jænænæj|jænænæj]] || [[word:jænænæsh|jænænæsh]] || [[word:jænænæ|jænænæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:janananath|janananath]] || [[word:janananaj|janananaj]] || [[word:janananash|janananash]] || [[word:jananana|jananana]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:jananath|jananath]] || [[word:jananaj|jananaj]] || [[word:jananash|jananash]] || [[word:janana|janana]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:janafnath|janafnath]] || [[word:janafnaj|janafnaj]] || [[word:janafnash|janafnash]] || [[word:janafnaf|janafnaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:jananatha|jananatha]] || [[word:jananaja|jananaja]] || [[word:jananasha|jananasha]] || [[word:jananaka|jananaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:jananath|jananath]] || [[word:jananaj|jananaj]] || [[word:jananash|jananash]] || [[word:janana|janana]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:jananathal|jananathal]] || [[word:jananajal|jananajal]] || [[word:jananashal|jananashal]] || [[word:jananakal|jananakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:jananathatha|jananathatha]] || [[word:jananajaja|jananajaja]] || [[word:jananashasha|jananashasha]] || [[word:jananaka|jananaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:jananathan|jananathan]] || [[word:jananajan|jananajan]] || [[word:jananashan|jananashan]] || [[word:jananakan|jananakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:jananathaoro|jananathaoro]] || [[word:jananajaoro|jananajaoro]] || [[word:jananashaoro|jananashaoro]] || [[word:jananakaoro|jananakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|d2c7592}}
